chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln Nos.500 and 501 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of case. 08.09.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- The applicant and his counsel are not appearing regularly for the last several dates. They were also cautioned on the last hearing date. None are present today on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. It appears that the applicant has lost interest in pursuing these miscellaneous applications. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
